reaches.name: Piru Creek and tributaries upstream of Pyramid Lake
reaches.fromDesc: Headwaters (Los Padres National Forest, Lockwood Valley/Mutau Flat area)

reaches.name: Piru Creek, Pyramid Dam to bridge below the dam
reaches.toDesc: Bridge approximately 300 yards below Pyramid Lake

reaches.name: Piru Creek, bridge below dam to falls above old Highway 99 bridge
reaches.fromDesc: Bridge approximately 300 yards below Pyramid Lake

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(109) — Piru Creek (Los Angeles and Ventura Cos.)
sources.quotedText: Piru Creek (Los Angeles and Ventura Cos.). (A) Piru Creek and tributaries upstream of Pyramid Lake. All year. Only artificial lures may be used. 2 trout

sources.title: California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 273030, "Piru Creek", Stream, CA, Los Angeles/Ventura Cos.
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":273030,"gaz_name":"Piru Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","state_alpha":"CA"} — geometry multipoint; first point converts to lon -118.7857, lat 34.3989, near the creek's mouth at the Santa Clara River south of Piru, correcting the file's prior coordinate (-118.7768, 34.6564) which sat ~25km north near Pyramid Dam and did not match any GNIS-derived point.

groups.humanSummary: Piru Creek and tributaries upstream of Pyramid Lake: open all year, artificial lures only, 2 trout.
groups.verbatimText: Piru Creek and tributaries upstream of Pyramid Lake. All year. Only artificial lures may be used. 2 trout

groups.humanSummary: From Pyramid Dam downstream to the bridge approximately 300 yards below Pyramid Lake: closed to all fishing all year.
groups.verbatimText: From Pyramid Dam downstream to the bridge approximately 300 yards below Pyramid Lake. Closed to all fishing all year.

groups.humanSummary: From the bridge approximately 300 yards below Pyramid Lake downstream to the falls about 1/2 mile above the old Highway 99 bridge: open all year, artificial lures with barbless hooks only, 0 trout (catch-and-release).
groups.verbatimText: From the bridge approximately 300 yards below Pyramid Lake downstream to the falls about 1/2 mile above the old Highway 99 bridge. All year. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout

regulations.humanSummary: Open all year, upstream of Pyramid Lake
regulations.verbatimText: Piru Creek and tributaries upstream of Pyramid Lake. All year.

parameters.note: Only artificial lures may be used.

regulations.humanSummary: Only artificial lures may be used, upstream of Pyramid Lake
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures may be used.

parameters.counting_rule: 2 trout daily bag limit; this special regulation entry does not specify a distinct possession limit.

regulations.humanSummary: 2 trout daily bag limit, upstream of Pyramid Lake

parameters.note: Closed for the stretch from Pyramid Dam downstream to the bridge approximately 300 yards below Pyramid Lake.

regulations.humanSummary: Closed to all fishing all year, Pyramid Dam to bridge ~300 yards below Pyramid Lake
regulations.verbatimText: From Pyramid Dam downstream to the bridge approximately 300 yards below Pyramid Lake. Closed to all fishing all year.

regulations.humanSummary: Open all year (catch-and-release), bridge below dam to falls above the old Highway 99 bridge
regulations.verbatimText: From the bridge approximately 300 yards below Pyramid Lake downstream to the falls about 1/2 mile above the old Highway 99 bridge. All year.

parameters.note: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

regulations.humanSummary: Artificial lures with barbless hooks only, bridge below dam to falls above the old Highway 99 bridge
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

regulations.humanSummary: 0 trout, catch-and-release, bridge below dam to falls above the old Highway 99 bridge

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
